name: Sanwal Yaar Piya
overview: Sanwal Yaar Piya is a tale of love, fate, and the tangled lives of three individuals—Sanwal, Aliyaar, and Piya. Their destinies collide amidst challenges of loyalty, sacrifice, and a complicated past.
